Home

Home

This page is currently awaiting content

Strive - Aspire - Succeed

Welcome
At St. Martin's, we believe education is more than just learning; it is about inspiring every child to reach their full potential. Our schools are high-achieving, happy, vibrant and forward-thinking, creating an environment where children thrive both academically and socially.
Our pupils have a genuine thirst for knowledge and our dedicated staff work tirelessly to ensure that every child achieves their very best. We set high standards because we believe in the capabilities of each and every child. Our goal is simple: to make the seven years your child spends with us a truly memorable part of their learning journey.

READ MORE

Home
Contact Us

Contact Us

St Martin's C of E Infant School

Address: Worple Road, Epsom, Surrey KT18 7AA

St Martin's C of E Junior School

Address: Ashley Road, Epsom, Surrey KT18 7AD

for both schools

Email: office@stmartinsepsom.school

Telephone: 01372 846930

Office Hours: Monday - Friday, 8:30am to 4:00pm term time

Year Group Email Addresses

Please use the following email addresses to contact your child's class teacher.

They will endeavour to reply to you within 2 working days.

Please do not use these email addresses to report your child's absence. Please use office@

These accounts are only checked during term time.

earlyyears@stmartinsepsom.school

year1@stmartinsepsom.school

year2@stmartinsepsom.school

year3@stmartinsepsom.school

year4@stmartinsepsom.school

year5@stmartinsepsom.school

year6@stmartinsepsom.school

SENDCo Email Address

Please use the following email address to contact our Special Educational Needs and/or Disability Co-ordinator (SENDCo) - Mrs Hughes.

This account is only checked during term time.

inclusionadmin@stmartinsepsom.school

Music Email Address

Please use the following email address to contact our music teacher, Mrs Kelleher.

This account is only checked during term time.

music@stmartinsepsom.school

Library Email Address

Please use the following email address to contact our School Librarian, Miss Delpech.

This account is only checked during term time.

librarian@stmartinsepsom.school

Chair of Governors Contact Information

Mrs Jaynn Taylor - Chair of Governors

St Martins C of E Schools, Ashley Road, Epsom, KT18 7AD

jtaylor@stmartinsepsom.school

Concerns

If you have a concern you would like to raise with the school, we would encourage you in the first instance to speak with the class teacher or Year Group Lead, who will be happy to help and discuss this with you. If you feel that your concern has not been fully resolved, you are welcome to raise the matter more formally with the Senior Leadership Team. You can do this by emailing concerns@stmartinsepsom.school

For your information, please find below our Complaints Procedure, Complaints Form, and a Parents’ Guide to School Complaints.

COMPLAINTS Procedure

Complaint form

Parents guide to school complaints

Please be assured that we are committed to working with you and supporting you every step of the way to reach a positive outcome.

Please click here to be redirected to our policies page, where you can read about our Communication's Policy.

If you require a paper copy of any of the website information, please contact the school office on the details above.
